data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time capacity adjustment', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for real-time capacity adjustment but does not provide specific data or endpoints to validate its implementation. This indicates a clear gap in the current implementation regarding the requirement for real-time capacity adjustment.
gaps: No evidence of real-time capacity adjustment functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
